title: Eva 333 music video with soom unseen footageUp for 24 hours
display_title: Eva 333 music video with soom unseen footageUp for 24 hours
wikitext:
[]: Eva 3.33 music video with soom unseen footage(Up for 24 hours)             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Sep 18, 2016 12:41 pm http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/20 ... ts/.106612 Come and get the feels while you can! And then rip it so you can have it on your hard drive lol Edit: Also some of the unused footage was used in the animator expo if I'm not mistaken.

[]: Your thoughts on Full MV Sakura Nagashi Rebuild ver. ?             Quote Post by Didi » Sun Sep 18, 2016 12:59 pm Has anyone seen the MV? It's full version and only available for 24 hours... https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=J5HdwnJoq6w Things I noticed: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Eva 3.33 music video with soom unseen footage(Up for 24 hours)             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Sep 18, 2016 1:51 pm I watched it, I loved it. (In B4 Loop Theory speculations.)

[]: Re: Your thoughts on Full MV Sakura Nagashi Rebuild ver. ?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Sep 18, 2016 2:10 pm Anyone rip a high quality version? I need this for my Archives of Good and Evil... (No, my dumpy laptop isn't set up with the goodies to do such basic things, leave me alone q_q ) Didi wrote: Ayanami's lamp gradually dims and when it went out, the environment's dominantly colored red...as if it's being eaten by Red

[]: Re: Eva 3.33 music video with soom unseen footage(Up for 24 hours)             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Sun Sep 18, 2016 2:29 pm Given how rapid and quick the cut is, i assume it's happening as 4th Impact is starting, with Eva 13 rising rapidly up from the central dogma into the sky above

[]: Re: Eva 3.33 music video with soom unseen footage(Up for 24 hours)             Quote Post by Ray » Sun Sep 18, 2016 2:36 pm I didn't want to have the feels today. why Anno!? why did you give me the feels again!?

[]: Re: Your thoughts on Full MV Sakura Nagashi Rebuild ver. ?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Sep 18, 2016 3:02 pm Reichu wrote: Anyone rip a high quality version?

[]: Re: Eva 3.33 music video with soom unseen footage(Up for 24 hours)             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Sep 18, 2016 3:55 pm Thanks, Paul! Arcadia's legacy wrote: Given how rapid and quick the cut is, i assume it's happening as 4th Impact is starting, with Eva 13 rising rapidly up from the central dogma into the sky above

[]: Re: Eva 3.33 music video with soom unseen footage(Up for 24 hours)             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun Sep 18, 2016 4:34 pm ^None that I've noticed. The Black Moon, the Flying Pyramid and the Wunder weren't effected. Everything else was already core. Edit: Now this is interesting: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Eva 3.33 music video with soom unseen footage(Up for 24 hours)             Quote Post by robersora » Sun Sep 18, 2016 6:50 pm Instant boner achieved. Now I'm hyped... can't wait until 20XX when Final finally comes!

[]: Re: Eva 3.33 music video with soom unseen footage(Up for 24 hours)             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Sep 18, 2016 6:59 pm There's always the possibility (likelihood, even) that the footage was removed from Q because it was decided to continue the story differently

[]: Re: Eva 3.33 music video with soom unseen footage(Up for 24 hours)             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Sep 18, 2016 10:36 pm What a wonderful & pleasant surprise to receive out of the blue! That Eva Inspiration is fired up again!

[]: Re: Eva 3.33 music video with soom unseen footage(Up for 24 hours)             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Sep 19, 2016 12:44 am An anon on /a/ pointed this out: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Eva 3.33 music video with soom unseen footage(Up for 24 hours)             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Sep 19, 2016 1:39 am In my mind she always did. But either way her decision is important following the principle of Chekhov's Gun; thus we will at least hear of it in the final film.

[]: Re: Eva 3.33 music video with soom unseen footage(Up for 24 hours)             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Sep 19, 2016 7:18 am Rei Q took the SDAT Player? Holy crap, things are getting serious!

[]: Re: Eva 3.33 music video with soom unseen footage(Up for 24 hours)             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Sep 19, 2016 7:48 am To be fair, those pictures prove nothing; the second might just be the preparation for adding the S-DAT as in the first. There is, for instance, no indentation showing that it had been there and was removed.

[]: Re: Eva 3.33 music video with soom unseen footage(Up for 24 hours)             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Sep 19, 2016 8:46 am pwhodges wrote: There is, for instance, no indentation showing that it had been there and was removed.

[]: Re: Eva 3.33 music video with soom unseen footage(Up for 24 hours)             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Sep 19, 2016 9:33 am *SDAT Player retrieval intensifies*

[]: Re: Eva 3.33 music video with soom unseen footage(Up for 24 hours)             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Sep 19, 2016 10:30 am Unbeknownst to anyone, the S-DAT is a mind-control device which Gendou set up to control Shinji throughout this story. Subconsciously he has realised that, but each time he attempts to throw it away Rei (an agent of Gendou) returns it to him and his conscious mind under renewed control is unable to do anything but thank her. OK, that belongs in the fanfic area - but it seemed to fit here just nicely today.

[]: Re: Eva 3.33 music video with soom unseen footage(Up for 24 hours)             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Sep 19, 2016 11:28 am Gendo has evolved into some next level keikaku in the movies. It doesn't sound as unlikely as you might think.
